mapper.select: SELECT cert.id, cert.owner_id, cert.house_id, c.community_name, bd.building_name, u.unit_name, h.house_code, h.house_code AS house_name, cert.cert_status, cert.cert_status AS status, cert.apply_time, cert.approve_time, cert.reject_reason FROM ow_certification cert LEFT JOIN bs_house h ON cert.house_id = h.id LEFT JOIN bs_unit u ON h.unit_id = u.id LEFT JOIN bs_building bd ON u.building_id = bd.id LEFT JOIN bs_community c ON bd.community_id = c.id WHERE cert.owner_id = #{ownerId} AND cert.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY cert.apply_time DESC
SELECT * FROM ow_certification WHERE cert_status = 'PENDING' AND del_flag = 0 AND apply_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
